creator: shafaisal.us@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Doug Moore from comment #26)
with this patch, the box fails when it encounters the first dma_tag_create function, reboots continously. 

iproc_sdhci0: <Broadcom iProc SDHCI controller> mem 0x66420000-0x664200ff irq 74 on simplebus0
